The recorded beam current value and incident
energies were slightly corrected by reconstruction of
the Ti(p,x)48V IAEA monitor excitation function.
The Ti monitors were measured after ca 16 days to
avoid the interference from the 48Sc decay gammas.

foil to the following Au foil were measured and
added to the activity measured in the monitor itself
